entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Katika Inspir, dhamira yetu ni kuifanya elimu iwe ya kidemokrasia kwa kuifanya ipatikane, ivutie, na ifurahishe kwa wote. Tunaamini kwamba kila mtu ana haki ya elimu bora, bila kujali historia au hali zake. Jukwaa letu limeundwa kuwapa wanafunzi zana na rasilimali wanazohitaji kufanikiwa, huku likikuza upendo wa kujifunza. Tunajitahidi kuunda jamii jumuishi, yenye msaada, na inayowezesha, ambapo wanafunzi wanaweza kuungana wao kwa wao na waelimishaji kutoka duniani kote. Kwa kufanya kujifunza kuwe kwa kufurahisha na kufikika, tunalenga kuhamasisha kizazi cha wanaojifunza maisha yote walio tayari kukabiliana na changamoto za siku zijazo.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA ndiyo sheria ya kwanza ya jimbo nchini Marekani inayotaka tovuti za kibiashara na huduma za mtandaoni kuchapisha sera ya faragha. Upeo wa sheria hii unaenda mbali zaidi ya California na kumtaka mtu au kampuni nchini Marekani (na kwa namna inayowezekana duniani) inayoendesha tovuti zinazokusanya taarifa zinazoweza kumtambulisha mtu binafsi kutoka kwa watumiaji wa California ichapishe sera ya faragha inayoonekana wazi kwenye tovuti yake, ikieleza kwa usahihi taarifa zinazokusanywa na watu au taasisi ambazo taarifa hizo zinashirikiwa nazo, na kutii sera hiyo.

entries.source: Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.

Hata hivyo, hatukusanyi wala kuchakata kwa kujua Taarifa Binafsi kutoka kwa watoto walio chini ya umri wa miaka 13 na tunakataza mahsusi mtumiaji yeyote chini ya miaka 13 kutupatia taarifa zozote binafsi bila ridhaa ya mzazi. Ikiwa wewe ni mzazi wa mtoto aliye chini ya miaka 13 na unaamini mtoto wako ametupatia Taarifa Binafsi, tutachukua hatua zinazohitajika na kukujulisha ikibidi. entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Kwa mara ya kwanza, koloni la zamani lisilokuwa na historia ya taifa hapo awali likawa nguvu ya kimataifa. Wafalme na malkia wa Ulaya waliondolewa madarakani, na Marekani ikaibuka kama alama ya demokrasia, ubepari, na dunia huru. Wakati huohuo, itikadi mpya ya ukomunisti iliibuka na Umoja wa Kisovieti ukawa mfano wake wa vitendo.

entries.source: Inspir wants to help in ensuring learning should be fun and for everyone. We strive for a day education reaches to everyone, everywhere through technology. Starting with the 1,415,422,077 in India.
entries.value: Inspir inataka kusaidia kuhakikisha kujifunza kunakuwa kwa kufurahisha na kwa kila mtu. Tunajitahidi kufikia siku ambayo elimu itamfikia kila mtu, kila mahali kupitia teknolojia. Tukianza na watu 1,415,422,077 nchini India.

entries.source: Inspiring individuals to be creative and capable of withstanding the AI revolution is essential. Only by providing essential products and services for free to those who cannot afford them and sustaining access for those who can, can the world pursue happiness collectively.
entries.value: Ni muhimu kuhamasisha watu binafsi kuwa wabunifu na wenye uwezo wa kustahimili mapinduzi ya AI. Ni kwa kutoa bidhaa na huduma muhimu bila malipo kwa wale wasioweza kuzimudu na kudumisha ufikiaji kwa wale wanaoweza, ndipo dunia inaweza kutafuta furaha kwa pamoja.

entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Kufuta taarifa zako binafsi. Ukitoa ombi hili, tutafuta taarifa binafsi tulizonazo kukuhusu kufikia tarehe ya ombi lako kutoka kwenye rekodi zetu na kuwaelekeza watoa huduma wowote kufanya vivyo hivyo. Katika baadhi ya hali, kufuta kunaweza kufanywa kwa kuondoa utambulisho wa taarifa. Ukichagua kufuta taarifa zako binafsi, huenda usiweze kutumia vipengele fulani vinavyohitaji taarifa zako binafsi ili kufanya kazi. Kukomesha uuzaji wa taarifa zako binafsi. Hatuuzi wala kukodisha taarifa zako binafsi kwa wahusika wowote wa tatu kwa madhumuni yoyote. Hatuuzi taarifa zako binafsi kwa malipo ya fedha. Hata hivyo, chini ya baadhi ya mazingira, uhamisho wa taarifa binafsi kwa mhusika wa tatu, au ndani ya familia yetu ya kampuni, bila malipo ya fedha unaweza kuchukuliwa kuwa “sale” chini ya sheria ya California. Wewe ndiye mmiliki pekee wa Personal Data yako na unaweza kuomba ufichuzi au kufutwa wakati wowote. Ukiwasilisha ombi la kukomesha uuzaji wa taarifa zako binafsi, tutasimamisha uhamisho huo. Tafadhali kumbuka, ukituomba tufute au tuache kuuza data yako, hilo linaweza kuathiri uzoefu wako nasi, na huenda usiweze kushiriki katika programu au huduma fulani za uanachama zinazohitaji matumizi ya taarifa zako binafsi ili kufanya kazi. Lakini kwa hali yoyote, hatutakubagua kwa kutumia haki zako. Ili kutumia haki zako za ulinzi wa data za California zilizoelezwa hapo juu, tafadhali tuma maombi yako kwa barua pepe: support@inspir.app Haki zako za ulinzi wa data zilizoelezwa hapo juu zinalindwa na CCPA, kifupi cha California Consumer Privacy Act. Ili kujua zaidi, tembelea tovuti rasmi ya California Legislative Information. CCPA ilianza kutumika tarehe 01/01/2020.

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.

Cookies ni faili zenye kiasi kidogo cha data ambacho kinaweza kujumuisha kitambulisho cha kipekee kisichojulikana. Cookies hutumwa kwa kivinjari chako kutoka tovuti na kuhifadhiwa kwenye kifaa chako. Teknolojia nyingine za ufuatiliaji pia hutumiwa kama beacons, tags na scripts kukusanya na kufuatilia taarifa na kuboresha na kuchambua Service yetu. Unaweza kuelekeza kivinjari chako kukataa cookies zote au kuonyesha wakati cookie inapotumwa. Hata hivyo, usipokubali cookies, huenda usiweze kutumia baadhi ya sehemu za Service yetu. entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Historia ya dunia wakati wote imekuwa kama kukuza picha kutoka mbali, picha iliyokuwa ikibadilika. Karne zilizoelekea karne ya 19 ziliashiria hatua ya mabadiliko katika historia ya binadamu, dunia ilipohama kutoka mtazamo bapa na uliodhibitiwa wa ulimwengu kwenda uelewa unaokua wa maeneo na makoloni mapya. Mapinduzi ya Ufaransa yaliashiria mara ya kwanza ambapo idadi kubwa ya watu ilikusanyika kupinga na kuanzisha maadili ya uhuru, usawa, na udugu. Matukio ya Vita vya Pili vya Dunia pia yaliunda dunia kwa karne iliyofuata na kuweka msingi wa karne ya 21.
